currentCheckpoint.label: Prelude
recap: The company has turned east and committed to Lösweg.
Halvash left them with the bone disc, the manifest, and a trail that points toward Torweg.
Floki, Sygna, Serris, and Ragnfridd are all meaningful going into the chapter.

checkpoints.label: Prelude
recap: The company has turned east and committed to Lösweg.
Halvash left them with the bone disc, the manifest, and a trail that points toward Torweg.
Floki, Sygna, Serris, and Ragnfridd are all meaningful going into the chapter.

checkpoints.label: The Meridian
recap: The west is closed whether they like it or not.
Edvar and Floki have pushed them onto the Greyback and into Lösweg.
The chapter has committed to pursuit rather than retreat.

checkpoints.label: Cargo & Map
recap: The cargo is real, old, and too important to be ordinary freight.
The Maw is now a named inland location tied to the artefacts.
The voyage has changed from travel to investigation.

checkpoints.label: The Whale-Road
recap: Something on the Whale-Road wants the cargo specifically.
The sea encounter confirms the artefacts are already pulling attention.
Torweg is no longer just a destination; it is part of the problem.

checkpoints.label: Torweg Arrival & Brynja
recap: Torweg is wrong on arrival, and Brynja knows enough to be worried without knowing everything.
Vane has been moving cargo south on Mathr's orders.
The city has opened into four real investigation threads: Brix, the Maw, Duvash, and the Records.

checkpoints.label: Investigation Threads
recap: Mathr's family story does not add up cleanly in the records or in oral history.
The Maw, the artefacts, and the Halvash violence are part of one structure, not isolated mysteries.
The south dock is now the pressure point where the players can force the next answer.

checkpoints.label: South Dock & Vane
recap: Aldric Vane is a loyal servant, not the true architect of what is happening.
Vane arranged transit and cargo movement on Mathr's authority without understanding the full crime.
The confrontation should leave the table ready for the Truthspeaker and the real reveal.

checkpoints.label: Truthspeaker & Closing
recap: The operation belongs to Mathr, not Vane.
The Truthspeaker and the Ashvein pin widen the conspiracy beyond Torweg.
The next road is north to Valweg before Dugweb's visit if they want any clean chance to expose this.
